prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约2010→2217→3192→4897→6264，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4254名，年均后移超1000名；2025年基准约6264名，较2024年后移1367名，后移速度加快；本省物理类计划2021年34人、2022年35人、2023年35人、2024年35人、2025年37人；2026年计划38人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招幅度约2.7%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名略有下降（2021年第47→2026年第57），但仍属全国顶尖财经类院校；2026年声誉评价数据中未收录该校，近年声誉整体平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现报考热度异常信号；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A-及以上等级，在财经类院校中优势突出；招生专业中金融学类、经济学类、工商管理类等均对应上述优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2021–2024年从"推荐"（72.42）降至"分化观望"（60.96–65.49），整体呈分化态势，但对外经济贸易大学作为"两财一贸"成员，其财经类专业仍具较强吸引力；本省物理类考生2025年约14.3万人，2026年估算约14.3万人（按总考生20万×71.5%），考生规模基本持平；省控线（本科批）2025年367分，与2024年368分基本持平，卷面难度稳定；该校位于北京，非本省院校；辽宁省招生占比约2.3%–3.2%，属中等偏下水平，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次持续大幅后移趋势（近4年后移超4200名）、2026年计划仅扩招1人（+2.7%）、考生规模基本持平、学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年位次将继续小幅后移但速度可能趋缓；预测最低位次约6400名，区间5900–6900名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融工程（量化金融实验班）
- 法学类（法学、法学（大数据双学士学位项目））
- 工商管理类（会计学、财务管理等，含北邮联合学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融工程（大类招生）（金融工程、金融科技，含北邮AI联合学士学位项目）
- 金融数学
- 经济学类（国际经济与贸易、财政学、税收学）
- 经济统计学
- 精算学（含双学士学位项目及国际交流项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（大类招生，含AI、智能科学与技术等）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）
- 法学（涉外型卓越经贸法律人才实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5900–6900名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（金融工程大类、金融数学、经济学类等），一档专业（量化金融实验班、法学类、工商管理类）作为冲刺，三档专业（数据科学大类、金融学类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5900名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2010 → 2217 → 3192 → 4897 → 6264, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 4254 places over the past 4 years, averaging over 1000 places per year; the baseline for 2025 is about 6264, a decline of 1367 places from 2024, accelerating the downward trend; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 34 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 38, a slight increase of 1 student from 2025, an expansion of about 2.7%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a slight decline in recent years (47th in 2021 to 57th in 2026), but still among the top national finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation data does not include this university, but its reputation has been generally stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity; Applied Economics is rated A, Business Administration A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all at A- or above, highlighting advantages among finance and economics universities; the enrollment majors include Finance, Economics, and Business Administration, all corresponding to the above advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/business majors from 2021 to 2024 dropped from 'recommended' (72.42) to 'divergent and wait-and-see' (60.96–65.49), showing an overall divergence, but as a member of the 'Two Finance and One Trade' group, its finance and economics majors still have strong appeal; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 143,000 in 2025, estimated at about 143,000 in 2026 (based on 200,000 total examinees × 71.5%), with the examinee scale basically unchanged; the provincial control score (undergraduate batch) was 367 in 2025, basically flat with 368 in 2024, indicating stable exam difficulty; the university is located in Beijing, not a provincial institution; the enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2.3%–3.2%, which is moderately low, with no significant regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in Physics Category rankings (over 4200 places decline in the past 4 years), the 2026 plan only expands by 1 student (+2.7%), the examinee scale is basically unchanged, and the university's reputation is stable, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to decline slightly but the pace may slow; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6400, with a range of 5900–6900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class)
- Law (Law, Law (Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program))
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, etc., including BUPT Joint Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Financial Engineering (Major Category Enrollment) (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology, including BUPT AI Joint Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Financial Mathematics
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
- Economic Statistics
- Actuarial Science (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program and International Exchange Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Category Enrollment, including AI, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc.)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- Law (Foreign-Oriented Excellent Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5900–6900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Financial Engineering Major Category, Financial Mathematics, Economics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class, Law, Business Administration) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Data Science Major Category, Finance) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5900), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately 383 → 503 → 673 → 509 → 573, showing an overall upward trend (increasing ranking numbers). The 2025 baseline is about 573, up 64 from 2024. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 28 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 27 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 29, an increase of 2 students from 2025, an expansion of about 7.4%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. No reputation evaluation data for 2026 was collected; recent reputation is generally stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms. Applied Economics is A, Business Administration is A, Foreign Languages and Literature is A-. The enrolled majors, such as Finance, Economics, Business Administration, and Law, all correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics majors shows a differentiated wait-and-see trend, but as a member of the 'Two Finance and One Trade' group, the University of International Business and Economics is highly attractive to liberal arts candidates. In 2025, there were about 56,000 History Category candidates in the province; in 2026, it is estimated to be about 57,000 (based on 200,000 total candidates × 28.5%), a slight increase in candidate scale (+1.2%), intensifying competition slightly. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 437 in 2025, up 37 points from 400 in 2024, indicating easier exam papers or improved overall candidate performance, which may push ranking numbers higher. The university is located in Beijing, not a provincial institution. Liaoning's enrollment share is about 2.3%–3.2%, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in History Category rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+7.4%), a slight increase in candidate numbers, and a significant rise in the provincial control line, the expansion exerts a downward pull on rankings, while the increase in candidates and control line exert an upward push, offsetting each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 610, with a range of 500–720.

- International Economics and Trade (International Organization Talent Base Class) (All enter the International Economics and Trade-Law Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Law (Foreign-Oriented Excellent Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
